_comment: Signal weighting knobs. Pass with `--weights weights.json` to signals/plan/poll. Tune these against `enrich --llm` output. Values shown are the built-in defaults.
_flow_comment: Per-asset USD tanh-scale for the ETF-flow bias (bigger = less sensitive).
_supply_comment: On-chain supply bias: unlock_scale = fraction-of-float that saturates the bearish bias; stake_scale = net ETH entry that saturates the bullish bias; exit_weight down-weights the noisy exit queue.
_market_comment: Market/momentum layer: fng_weight = how much market-wide Fear&Greed nudges per-asset momentum; macd_scale = MACD-histogram sensitivity.
_derivs_comment: Derivatives positioning layer: funding_scale = perp funding rate that saturates the crowded-positioning bias (bigger = less sensitive); derivs_halflife = hours for the recency decay.
_severity_comment: Phase-8a: per-post multiplier from the LLM's severity judgment (how market-moving). Lexicon rows have severity NULL → treated as 1.0 (not listed here); an explicit 'none' damps hard.
_halflife_comment: Phase-8a: per-catalyst time-decay half-life in HOURS (a hack reprices in hours, regulation over days). Unlisted catalysts fall back to the single halflife_hours arg (default 6).
